Scripting elements
==================
These elements are used to write java code inside JSP pages
Following three scripting elements are given in JSP
1. Declration element
<%!
//Declare fields and methods here
%>

2. Scriptlet element
<%
//Write java code to perform task here. This code will be inserted inside service method of auto-generated servlet
%>

3. Expression element
<%=
//Write code to bind data with html element here
%>

<h1><%=name%></h1>
